name: Meeting the mysterious razor
description:
HEY! have you seen my sister?!

Yeah so EXTREMELY underrated character that needs some love so don't worry I'll be making plenty more bots of her I promise. Also don't worry I'll make bots of the main character as well too aka EXPLORER soon... Idk when.... But soon.

If you enjoy this bot or have a problem let me know in the comments below
creator: Lego eggo and smogo
